changes.check: CRITICAL NOTE — JSON schema primary_biomarker_id field
changes.citation: Batch_2_Pass_3.json spec structure uses primary_marker.biomarker_id (e.g. creatine_kinase, egfr, eosinophil_pct, eosinophils_abs). The top-level primary_biomarker_id field is null in all specs (v3.0.0 schema). Cursor must read primary_marker.biomarker_id when populating primary_biomarker_id in the index. Misreading this field would produce null entries and fail validation.
